task-1774824740902-vncvpk.description: Create server/routes/transcripts.js — a REST API endpoint for processing audio transcripts. Requirements: (1) POST /api/transcripts — accepts { audioFileId, clientEmail, sessionId } in request body, validates all fields are present, (2) GET /api/transcripts/:sessionId — returns transcript for a session, (3) Basic error handling with consistent JSON error responses { error: string, code: string }, (4) Input sanitization on all user-supplied fields, (5) Use express.Router(), export the router as default. Keep the file under 150 lines.

task-1774824746367-zx8jmg.description: Review the code written by the coder agent in server/routes/transcripts.js. Check for: (1) Input validation completeness — are all fields validated and sanitized?, (2) Error handling — are all failure paths covered with correct HTTP status codes?, (3) Security — SQL/NoSQL injection risks, path traversal, over-permissive responses, (4) Code quality — consistency, clarity, adherence to express.Router() pattern, (5) Any missing edge cases (empty body, invalid sessionId format, missing file). Return a structured review with PASS / NEEDS CHANGE verdict per item.
